description: The Asian Boyz are a street gang based in Southern California, founded in the late 1980s by Cambodian refugees to protect themselves from other gangs. The gang has 2,000 to 5,000 active members, primarily Southeast Asian, and is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, assault, and homicide. They are active in 28 cities across 14 U.S. states and have ties to the Crips.
